title: triodia ciliata
intro: Triodia ciliata, also known as the spinifex grass or porcupine grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triodia ciliata include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Triodia ciliata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine for centuries.
